description: Portable MCP server for fallback web search, browser-aware fetch, and local site crawling.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.rich-jojo/smart-web

environmentVariables.description: Optional high-level runtime profile. Use `balanced` for the default behavior or `private` to default to relay-off and public-search-helper-off behavior.
environmentVariables.name: SMART_WEB_PROFILE

environmentVariables.description: Optional Exa key for the first search tier.
environmentVariables.name: EXA_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional Brave Search key for the second search tier.
environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional self-hosted SearXNG base URL for private, no-key search fallback before DuckDuckGo.
environmentVariables.name: SEARXNG_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional advanced override to force Exa search on or off.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTSEARCH_ENABLE_EXA

environmentVariables.description: Optional advanced override to force Brave search on or off.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTSEARCH_ENABLE_BRAVE

environmentVariables.description: Optional advanced override to force SearXNG on or off.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTSEARCH_ENABLE_SEARXNG

environmentVariables.description: Optional advanced override to force DuckDuckGo HTML fallback on or off.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTSEARCH_ENABLE_DUCKDUCKGO

environmentVariables.description: Optional advanced override to force Brave Search HTML fallback on or off.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTSEARCH_ENABLE_BRAVE_HTML

environmentVariables.description: Optional Playwright browser channel override.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTFETCH_CHROME_CHANNEL

environmentVariables.description: Optional explicit Chrome executable path for Playwright.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTFETCH_CHROME_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional advanced override to force FxTwitter relay enrichment on or off.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTFETCH_ENABLE_FXTWITTER

environmentVariables.description: Optional advanced override to force X oEmbed fallback on or off.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTFETCH_ENABLE_X_OEMBED

environmentVariables.description: Optional advanced override to force Reddit JSON enrichment on or off.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTFETCH_ENABLE_REDDIT_JSON

environmentVariables.description: Optional advanced override to force YouTube transcript enrichment on or off.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTFETCH_ENABLE_YOUTUBE_TRANSCRIPT

environmentVariables.description: Optional advanced override to force archive fallback on or off for blocked or paywalled pages.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTFETCH_ENABLE_ARCHIVE_FALLBACK

environmentVariables.description: Optional advanced override to force Internet Archive Wayback fallback on or off.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTFETCH_ENABLE_WAYBACK

environmentVariables.description: Optional advanced override to force archive.md fallback on or off.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTFETCH_ENABLE_ARCHIVE_MD

environmentVariables.description: Optional override to allow localhost/private/reserved fetch targets.
environmentVariables.name: SMART_WEB_ALLOW_PRIVATE_HOSTS

environmentVariables.description: Optional advanced override that forces local-only mode regardless of the selected profile.
environmentVariables.name: SMART_WEB_LOCAL_ONLY

title: smart-web
